titleStmt.title: SII 19.92: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 92. (A.R. No. 213 of 1907.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: The inscription is damaged and incomplete. It gives a list of the presents of gold made to the temple of Mūlasthānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at [Tiruvi]ḍaimarudil in Tiraimūr-nāḍu on the south bank of the river by several individual donors, each specifying the purpose of the gift, thus; a gift of 22 kaḻañju and odd of gold made in company with others by Madhurāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ the adhikāri administering the śrīkāryam of the temple, which was utilised for (the purchase of) some vessels for the sacred bath of the deity: a gift of 20 kaḻañju by a lady named Guṇavaḍigaḷ for burning two perpetual lamps; a gift of 10 kaḻañju by one Tiruviḍaippichchi for two day-lamps; a gift of 25 kaḻañju by Vīramādēviyār (mentioned in No. 86 above ?) for a persetual lamp: and 20 kaḻañju by another lady named Oṟṟiyūr••••••••• for a perpetual lamp. Items 2 to 4 were entrusted to the owners of an oil-mill of the place, the sabhā of Tiraimūr and the nagarattār of Tiruviḍaimarudil.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu 4Āvatu teṉkarai tiraimurnāṭṭu tiruviṭai marutil śrīmūlasthānattu perumāṉaṭikaḷ teva tiraimur sabhaiyārum tiruviṭaimarutil rutuṭaiyār śrīkāryam Ārāykiṉṟa Atikāri kaḷ maturāntaka muventaveḷārkkāy Ittevar śrīkārya
muṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ kaṇṇaṉāṉa Iṅkaṇāṭṭup pallavaraiyaṉ ta ku Ilakṣaṇattāl pokaṭava nākaṉpāṭiuṭaiyāṉ centaṉ taṭaiyaṉ taṉākaṉum ceta takavari payi kaiccuṭar Umaiyāḷ peraṉum bhattacaṉaṅkaḷ ciṟappu Iṭṭa poṟpūvuñ ciṟukka ya
kaiyālum poṉ Irupattu Irukaḻañcey Eṭṭumañcāṭiyuṅ poṉ koṇṭu tiruviṭaimarutil Āḷvāṉey Abhiṣe ceyya yāḷi Aṟukaḻañcum ṇṭikai Oṉṟiṉāl poṉ patiṉ kaḻañcum Innāḷ ceṭṭi Ikkuṇṭikaiyil
ṉār makaḷ kuṇavaṭikaḷ Oru nontāviḷakkiṉukku vaicca poṉ Ippoṉ Irupatiṉ kaḻaiñcum koṇṭu tiraimur cavaiyā raṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai Uḻakkiṉāl viḷakku ppomāṉār nantāviḷakkiṉṉukku parut ttār koṇṭa poṉ 10�2m Āka ṇṭu ti ttārumāy nicati Uḻakkāka Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai U l viḷakkukku 4� perumāṉār
viṭai marutilc cekkālaicceri Irupatiṉkaḻaiñcu poṉ kuṭut mākac ce kiṭṭu kuṭuttu nicatam Uḻakkāka Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇaiyāl nontāviḷakku 1 � tiruviṭaippicciyār pakalviḷakkiṉukku vaicca poṉ ṉil tiraimurac cavaiyāk koṇṭa poṉ 5� Ippoṉ ṉaiṅkaḻañcum koṇṭu ṇṇai Oru piṭiyum Itaṉil tiruviṭaimarutil nakarattār koṇṭa poṉ ṉaiṅkaḻaiñcu Ippoṉ5� r Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai cum Oru piṭiyummāka Ira
pakalviḷakku 1—�2m viramāteviyār nontāviḷakkiṉukku poṉ 2 10 5� Ippoṉ ṉirupattai ṅkaḻaiñcum koṇṭu tiruviṭaimarutil nakarattār Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai nicatam tevaṉār makaḷ Oṟṟiyūr ppe tiruviḷakkiṉukku vaicca poṉ 2 10� Ippoṉ Irupatiṉkaḻaiñcum tiruviṭai ṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai kiṉāl viḷakku 2mThe inscription stops here. On the tiers of the same wall are found three fragmentary inscriptions the connection of which with the above is not clear.

viṭaimaru Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom O ṉṟa yili mutalum paḻaviṟaiyum tavirntu Arcca coḻamuventaveḷānukku janmak kāṇiyāy Ivvūr vaṇṭuvarai paṅkil nila nūṟṟuk ṉal Iv
puravuvari cempiyaṉ Uttara mantiriyum mivvūr kiḻavaṉnaṭikaḷ nanti nampi yaraicūruṭaiyāṉ luṭaiyāṉ ceūraṉ kaṟpakamāṉa ṇamuventaveḷān ma kkeḷviyālum keṭṭu nam Olai Eḻutum Amaṇāṉūṭaiyāṉ Uttaramantari paṭṭālakam Eḻuttinālume Olaināyakaṉ cikkaruṭai yāṉ nakkaṉ kaṇiccaṉ nāṉa coḻamuventaveḷāṉ mpakka leṭutta
ṟṟukkala nellu Eṇṇāḻika nāṉ Iṟaiyili variyil Iṭṭuk kuṭutta taṅkaḷ tu piṭākai naṭappippatāka nakkaṉkuṭi kiḻavaṉ kaṇṇuṭaip perumānāṉa Utaiyamārttāṇṭa muventaveḷāṉaiyum puravuvari Iṟaiyāṉkuṭi makaṉ taṇṭi pūtiyāṉa cempiyaṉ Uttaramantiri timaṅkalattu kuravaceri ke ntapurapaṭṭaṉaiyum ntūr tāṅkaḷum Ivarkaḷḷoṭu niṉṟu

Immuṭṭiyālum va paṅku 6 Ivveṇṇai paṅku Āṟi makaṉ nakkaṉ Ila
li Oru paṅkā l Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai tiṅkaḷ nāḻi makaṉ nakkaṉāṉa likku kkāli Oru paṅku ṇṭu koṇṭu tiṅkaḷā laṭṭak kaṭava Eṇṇai nāḻiyum mittaḷit te
Aṭṭakkaṭava Eṇṇai tiṅkaḷ nāḻiyum ttaḷi tevaṉār makaḷ nakkaṉācci naṅkaiāṉa Iraṇṭāyirat talaikkoliyār mā

svasti paramācāryaṉ kāṭaṉ paṭṭaṉ tiruviṭaimarutuṭai tāviḷakkukku vaitta poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Ippoṉ
koṇṭu yāka Aṭṭakkaṭava neyyāl nontāviḷakku Oṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 19.92 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
